subcodes.first_line: O ye two who turn towards God and are accepted at the Threshold of His grandeur! How lofty is your destiny and how blessed your fortune [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مقبل الی الله و دو مقبول درگاه کبریاء زهی بلنداختری و خوش بختی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
